report.summary: Drafted 3 new social posts (#142: Grayscale HYPE DeFi ETF, #143: Nasdaq tokenized equities trading, #144: Tax season 21-day countdown), newsletter v24 addendum v11 with 170+ page publishing milestone and Thu convergence preview, created 2 SVG social cards (Grayscale HYPE ETF and Tax Countdown). F&G recovered to 35; Thu Mar 27 double catalyst ($13.5B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings) is the week's defining event.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #142 [NEW]: Grayscale HYPE DeFi ETF — First DeFi-focused ETF filing from a major issuer, tracks UNI/AAVE/MKR/LDO. CTA to grayscale-hype-etf-defi-guide (scheduled Wed Mar 25 10PM ET)

Tweet #143 [NEW]: Nasdaq Tokenized Equities Trading — Nasdaq approved to trade tokenized securities, traditional finance rails merging with blockchain. CTA to nasdaq-tokenized-equities-trading-guide-2026 (scheduled Thu Mar 26 8AM ET)

Tweet #144 [NEW]: Tax Season Countdown — 21 days to April 15 deadline, free tax calculator + regional guides for US/UK/Canada/Australia/Germany. CTA to /taxes and /tools/tax-calculator (scheduled Thu Mar 26 11AM ET)
Tweets #139-141 carried from v1 (Fear recovery, NYSE ETF options limits, DCA spotlight)
Tweets #133-138 carried from v10 (Double Catalyst, Katana Perps, Tokenized Funds, Congress recap, BitGo IPO, Options expiry)

Newsletter v24 addendum v11: Added 170+ page publishing milestone section, Grayscale HYPE ETF coverage, Nasdaq tokenized securities, tax deadline urgency block. Subject: 'Thursday's Double Catalyst: $13.5B Options Expire + SEC Rules on 91 ETFs'
Content calendar v38: 19 posts Wed Mar 25 through Mon Mar 31 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: FEAR RECOVERY: F&G jumped from historic 8 to 35. 46+ day extreme fear streak may be ending. This is the single most important sentiment shift of 2026 Q1 — content about recovery and accumulation strategies should see major engagement.
CONVERGENCE EVENT THU: $13.5B options expiry + SEC ruling on 91 ETF applications on the same day (Mar 27). All social content is building toward this as the week's defining moment.
PUBLISHING MILESTONE: 170+ new pages published this week alone. Platform now at 528+ indexed slugs across 813+ total published paths. Content velocity is the highest it's ever been.
TAX WINDOW OPENING: 21 days to April 15. Search volume for crypto tax queries historically peaks in the final 3 weeks. Tax calculator and regional guides should see significant organic lift.

INSTITUTIONAL SIGNALS: Grayscale HYPE DeFi ETF filing, Nasdaq tokenized equities approval, $312B stablecoin ATH, $2.5B March ETF inflows, Bernstein $150K BTC target. Institutional narrative is overwhelmingly bullish despite retail fear.
BITGO CATALYST: First crypto custody IPO earnings report tomorrow. Positive beat could trigger another sentiment shift.
BLOCKED: Git index.lock issue persists — deploy gap widening. Content is being published to the config but may not be live on Vercel until the lock is resolved.
